title: Open work permits: eligibility, restrictions, and application  - Canada.ca
content:
There are 2 types of work permits: open work permits and employer-specific work permits .
You can get an open work permit in certain situations.
- What is an open work permit
- Restrictions on your open work permit
- Is this the right work permit for you
- Apply for an open work permit

## What is an open work permit
An open work permit lets you work for any employer in Canada, except those who
- are on the non-compliant list , or
- regularly offer striptease, erotic dance or escort services, or erotic massages
You don’t need a job offer to apply for an open work permit. Open work permits aren’t job-specific, so if you have one, your employer doesn’t need to
- apply for a labour market impact assessment
- submit an offer of employment
- pay the employer compliance fee
Most people applying from outside Canada can’t get an open work permit. Most open work permit applicants must apply in Canada.
You can apply for an open work permit only under specific situations .

### Students, graduates and youth
- post-graduation work permit applicants
- International Experience Canada – Working Holiday category applicants
- Hong Kong recent graduates Closed

### Spouses and dependent children
- family members of permanent residence applicants
- family members of work permit holders
- spouses and common-law partners of international students
- sponsored family members
- refugees, asylum claimants and protected persons
- victims of workplace abuse

### Other open work permit applicants
- permanent residence applicants
- temporary resident permit holders

## Restrictions on your open work permit
You may have restrictions listed on your open work permit related to the following:
- what type of work you can do Example: You may need a medical exam to work in some jobs. Find out how to remove the medical conditions from your work permit .
- Example: You may need a medical exam to work in some jobs.
- Find out how to remove the medical conditions from your work permit .
- where you can work Example: If you have an open work permit under the provincial nominee class, you may be able to work only in a specific province. Find out if you can work at a different location from the one listed on your open work permit .
- Example: If you have an open work permit under the provincial nominee class, you may be able to work only in a specific province.
- Find out if you can work at a different location from the one listed on your open work permit .

## Is this the right work permit for you
You need to follow special instructions if you’re applying for certain open work permits. Answer a few questions to find out
- if you’re eligible for an open work permit
- if you need to follow special instructions to apply
Find out which type of work permit you need.

## Apply for an open work permit
The instructions to apply for a work permit vary depending on where you’re applying.
Apply from outside Canada
Apply at a port of entry
Extend your work permit

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
